# Ensemble Kalman Filter

**Summary**: A data assimilation method that uses an ensemble of model realizations to update state estimates based on observations.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alsamadony|Alsamadony, 2019]] used EnKF as a benchmark for comparing the performance of reinforcement learning methods in history matching.

## Key Results and Findings

- The EnKF reduced pressure RMSE from 0.123 to less than 0.06 in one time step. ([[2019-alsamadony|Alsamadony, 2019, p. 51]])
